Task description and export_result.sh SQLite queries

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to navigate to https://pypi.org/ and configure Tor Browser to use PyPI as a custom OpenSearch engine. The agent must remove Google from the default search engines and execute a search query for 'stem'. These parameters explicitly match the expected values and are dynamically verified by parsing the browser's search.json.mozlz4 configuration and querying the places.sqlite history database.
